iti81:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti81:2.1:
“Monks, I have seen beings conquered by receiving offerings–their minds overwhelmed–at the break-up of the body,
after death, reappearing in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.
iti81:3.1:
I have seen beings conquered by not receiving offerings–their minds overwhelmed–at the break-up of the body,
after death, reappearing in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.
iti81:4.1:
I have seen beings conquered both by receiving offerings & by not receiving offerings–their minds overwhelmed–
at the break-up of the body, after death, reappearing in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.
iti81:5.1:
“It’s not through having heard it from another contemplative or brahman that I say,
‘I have seen beings conquered by receiving offerings–their minds overwhelmed–at the break-up of the body,
after death, reappearing in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.
I have seen beings conquered by not receiving offerings–their minds overwhelmed–at the break-up of the body,
after death, reappearing in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.
I have seen beings conquered both by receiving offerings & by not receiving offerings–their minds overwhelmed–
at the break-up of the body, after death,
reappearing in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.’
iti81:5.2: “Instead, it’s from having known it myself, seen it myself, observed it myself that I say,
iti81:6.1:
‘I have seen beings conquered by receiving offerings–their minds overwhelmed–at the break-up of the body,
after death, reappearing in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.
iti81:7.1:
I have seen beings conquered by not receiving offerings–their minds overwhelmed–at the break-up of the body,
after death, reappearing in a plane of deprivation, a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.
iti81:8.1:
I have seen beings conquered both by receiving offerings & by not receiving offerings–their minds overwhelmed–
at the break-up of the body, after death, reappearing in a plane of deprivation,
a bad destination, a lower realm, hell.’”
iti81:10.4: is called a man of integrity.
